description: A procurement manager needs to generate a quarterly performance scorecard for a key supplier, looking at on-time delivery and quality.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all purchase orders and goods receipts for the supplier for the last quarter.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls the complete order history for the supplier for Q2.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the on-time delivery percentage by comparing the requested delivery date to the actual receipt date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calculates the on-time delivery rate as 92%.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the quality acceptance rate by checking how many lots were accepted versus rejected by QC.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calculates the quality acceptance rate as 99%.
